download_instructions: Download the current MapPLUTO zip from the DCP MapPLUTO page and place it in data_raw/dcp_mappluto_current/current/.
notes: Keep the original archive if the official filename differs.

download_instructions: Download archived MapPLUTO vintages from the DCP Bytes archive and place each zip in data_raw/dcp_mappluto_archive/<vintage>/.
notes: Create one vintage subfolder per archive release.

download_instructions: Download the official DCP community district boundary file and place it in data_raw/dcp_boundary_community_districts/current/.
notes: Use the current official release only in v1.

download_instructions: Download the official DCP city council district boundary file and place it in data_raw/dcp_boundary_city_council_districts/current/.
notes: Use the current official release only in v1.

download_instructions: Download the place-level BPS ASCII bundle from the Census directory and place it in data_raw/census_bps_place_ascii/current/.
notes: This is a citywide validation source only.

download_instructions: Create an NHGIS tract-level 1980 summary extract with tenure, occupied units, population, race, vacancy, median household income where available, and structure-type counts. Rename the final CSV to nhgis_1980_tract_summary.csv and place it in data_raw/nhgis_1980_tract_summary/1980/.
notes: Use one merged CSV for the canonical 1980 tract extract.

download_instructions: Download the matching 1980 tract boundary files from NHGIS, rename the zip to nhgis_1980_tract_boundaries.zip, and place it in data_raw/nhgis_1980_tract_boundaries/1980/.
notes: Keep the original NHGIS archive contents inside the renamed zip.

download_instructions: Create an NHGIS tract-level 1990 summary extract with tenure, occupied units, population, race, vacancy, median household income where available, and structure-type counts. Rename the final CSV to nhgis_1990_tract_summary.csv and place it in data_raw/nhgis_1990_tract_summary/1990/.
notes: Use one merged CSV for the canonical 1990 tract extract.

download_instructions: Download the matching 1990 tract boundary files from NHGIS, rename the zip to nhgis_1990_tract_boundaries.zip, and place it in data_raw/nhgis_1990_tract_boundaries/1990/.
notes: Keep the original NHGIS archive contents inside the renamed zip.

download_instructions: Download the relevant CoreData neighborhood indicator table as CSV and place it in data_raw/furman_coredata_neighborhood_indicators/current/.
notes: Use only for validation and descriptive comparison.
